query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `formTemplates` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `requestType` enum('admin_visit','work_permit','material_entry','tep','mop','escort') NOT NULL,
  `isDefault` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `companyName` varchar(255) DEFAULT 'Centre3',
  `companyNameAr` varchar(255),
  `logoUrl` varchar(500),
  `headerColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#6B21A8',
  `footerText` text,
  `footerTextAr` text,
  `footerPhone` varchar(50),
  `footerEmail` varchar(255),
  `footerDepartment` varchar(255),
  `footerDepartmentAr` varchar(255),
  `formTitle` varchar(255) DEFAULT 'Visit Permission',
  `formTitleAr` varchar(255),
  `formSubtitle` varchar(255),
  `formSubtitleAr` varchar(255),
  `fields` json NOT NULL,
  `infoSections` json,
  `safetyRules` json,
  `disclaimerText` text,
  `disclaimerTextAr` text,
  `showQrCode` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `qrCodePosition` enum('top-right','top-left','bottom-right','bottom-left') DEFAULT 'top-right',
  `showWatermark` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `watermarkText` varchar(100),
  `pageSize` enum('a4','letter') DEFAULT 'a4',
  `orientation` enum('portrait','landscape') DEFAULT 'portrait',
  `createdBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `formTemplates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
